violations.description: POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of rice prepared chicken in the walk in cooler and open cans of ingredients in the prep top cooler was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled to indicate for either restaurant or personal use in the walk in freezer and cooler.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelves in the prep areas noted not clean.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food items for personal use are not clearly labeled in walk in cooler and walk in freezer.
